best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-utente-006 title: login a registered user with short password module: utente source pages: 2 preconditions: user has been successfully registered. test data: - email: example@example.com - password: test12 test steps: 1. enter email and password in the login form. 2. click on the login button. 3. verify that the firebase authentication service is called with the provided email and password. 4. check that the response is an error due to password length less than 8 characters. expected result: user login should fail, and an error message should be displayed.

test case id: tc-utente-001 title: register a new user with valid credentials module: utente source pages: 3 preconditions: test data: - email: example@example.com - password: testpassword123 test steps: 1. enter email and password in the registration form. 2. click on the register button. 3. verify that the firebase authentication service is called with the provided email and password. 4. check that the response is not an error. 5. verify that the firebaseuser and userid are returned. 6. confirm that the user is logged in. 7. check that the user's data is stored in the database. expected result: user registration should succeed, and the user should be logged in with the correct firebaseuser and userid.

test case id: tc-utente-004 title: login a registered user with valid credentials module: utente source pages: 2 preconditions: user has been successfully registered. test data: - email: example@example.com - password: testpassword123 test steps: 1. enter email and password in the login form. 2. click on the login button. 3. verify that the firebase authentication service is called with the provided email and password. 4. check that the response is not an error. 5. verify that the firebaseuser is returned. expected result: user login should succeed, and the firebaseuser should be returned.
